calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2018 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2017 Set For Trial On Oct-29-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside And Withdraw Answer
Off Calendar Feb-01-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT SOLSTICE ENTERPRISES, INC.'s Motion To Set Aside And Withdraw Answer, as follows:

Defendant Solstice Enterprises, Inc.'s motion to set aside the answer it filed on September 12, 2017 is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

ORDER SIGNED after hearing.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: torreanom@aol.com; mtorreano@sftc.org.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-09-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-06-2017 Off Calendar
